column1: Wed, 20 Mar 2002 14:36:20 -0800 (PST),customerservice.1556092.33252.0@service.williams-sonoma.com,matt.motley@enron.com,Fresh Ideas for Easter Brunch from Williams-Sonoma,"Williams-Sonoma <http://service.williams-sonoma.com/1556092.33252.0.6799>

As delicious to behold as it is to savor, asparagus heralds spring in the most delightful way. Celebrate Easter with our charming asparagus plates, along with a simple recipe for preparing the tender, elegant spears (roast them!). Happy Easter!
